$schema_comment: Provenance + integrity manifest for tests/fixtures/face/. Updated by hand whenever a fixture file is regenerated. The smoke script does NOT consume this file directly; it is documentation for humans reviewing diffs.

fixtures.source: skimage.data.astronaut() (NASA portrait of astronaut Eileen Collins)
fixtures.license: public domain (work of NASA / U.S. Federal government employee, 17 U.S.C. §105). Bundled with scikit-image as skimage.data.astronaut.
fixtures.used_for: milestone #2b smoke: owner-known person bootstrap seeds gallery; the same image re-uploaded as wo_raw in a second project must hit the matched bucket via face embedding similarity.
